title: Immunofluorescence Staining of Heparan Sulfate in Islet Beta Cells
author: Sarah Popp
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kvycw7w
materials: goat anti mouse IgM AF488 (Thermo Fisher #A21042)

Apply secondary antibodies for anti-insulin or anti-glucagon pAb: (a) For insulin staining, apply goat anti-guinea pig IgG AF568 (Thermo Fisher #A11075), 10 μg/ml dilution in 2% BSA/PBS, 125 μl/section, and incubate for 30 min at room temperature. (b) For glucagon staining, apply donkey anti-rabbit IgG AF568 (Thermo Fisher #A10042), 4 μg/ml in 2% BSA/PBS , 125 μl/section, and incubate for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Deparaffinize slides in each xylene for 1 min (see Guidelines)
steps.instruction: Deparaffinize slides in each xylene for 1 min (see Guidelines). Rehydrate slides in graded alcohols beginning in absolute ethanol (10 dips)/ container of absolute ethanol), followed by 90% ethanol (10 dips) and 70% ethanol (10 dips). Wash well in running tap water for 5 min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections with a tissue,...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections with a tissue, encircle the sections using a diamond pencil and place in a slide container of tap water (250 ml).

steps.title: Prewarm slide tray containing low level...
steps.instruction: Prewarm slide tray containing low level of water (to humidify) in 37°C incubator.

steps.title: Prepare pronase (#537088 Calbiochem; for antigen...
steps.instruction: Prepare pronase (#537088 Calbiochem; for antigen retrieval to expose HS epitopes): 2.5 mg pronase in 5 ml de-ionized water.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and cover each section with pronase solution. Return humidified slide tray to 37°C incubator for 10 min.

steps.title: Wash sections with phosphate-buffered saline (PBS),...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with phosphate-buffered saline (PBS), 3 x, then 3 x 5 min in slide container containing 250 ml PBS with agitation of slides at 0, 2, and 5 min of each wash.

steps.title: Block sections with 2% bovine serum...
steps.instruction: Block sections with 2% bovine serum albumin (BSA) in PBS at room temperature for 30 min.

steps.title: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x,...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x, then 3 x 5 min in slide container containing 250 ml PBS with agitation of slides at 0, 2, and 5 min of each wash.

steps.title: Apply primary 10E4 anti-HS mAb, 100...
steps.instruction: Apply primary 10E4 anti-HS mAb, 100 μg/ml in 2% BSA/PBS, 125 μl/section. Incubate overnight at 4°C in a humidified tray (containing PBS).

steps.title: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x,...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x, then 3 x 5 min in slide container containing 250 ml PBS with agitation of slides at 0, 2, and 5 min of each wash.

steps.title: Apply secondary goat anti mouse IgM...
steps.instruction: Apply secondary goat anti mouse IgM AF488 (Thermo Fisher #A21042), 20 μg/ml with 2% BSA/PBS), 125 μl/section, and incubate for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x,...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x, then 3 x 5 min in slide container containing 250 ml PBS with agitation of slides at 0, 2, and 5 min of each wash.

steps.title: Apply anti-insulin or anti-glucagon pAb
steps.instruction: Apply anti-insulin or anti-glucagon pAb: (a) For insulin staining, apply polyclonal guinea pig anti-insulin (DAKO #A0564), 130 μg/ml in 2% BSA/PBS, 125 μl/section, and incubate for 30 min at room temperature. (b) For glucagon staining, apply rabbit polyclonal anti-glucagon (Abcam #ab133195), 10 μg/ml in 2% BSA/PBS, 125 μl/section, and incubate for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x,...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x, then 3 x 5 min in slide container containing 250 ml PBS with agitation of slides at 0, 2, and 5 min of each wash.

steps.title: Stain sections with DAPI (Sigma #D9524), 0
steps.instruction: Stain sections with DAPI (Sigma #D9524), 0.2 μg/ml in PBS for 2 min.

steps.title: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x,...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with PBS, 3 x, then 1 x 5 min in slide container containing 250 ml PBS with agitation of slides (10 x) at 0, 2.5 min and 5 min.

steps.title: Mount slides in ProLong® Diamond Antifade Mountant (Thermo Fisher #P36961)
steps.instruction: Mount slides in ProLong® Diamond Antifade Mountant (Thermo Fisher #P36961).

steps.title: Image sections using an automated Axio...
steps.instruction: Image sections using an automated Axio Observer inverted fluorescence microscope (Zeiss). Prepare merged images using ZEN (version 2.3) software (Zeiss).
